SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.esql

Class Sqlca

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNField
com.nib.commons.storage.NGroup
com.nib.commons.esql.Sqlca
All Implemented Interfaces:
IDataArea, Cloneable
public class Sqlca extends NGroup
Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area. It contains methods for handling SQL conditions, committing and rolling back transactions.

    Sqlwarn class provides a structure for SQL warning flags.
